case_title: ELMORE, CHRIS VS TRACEY, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRACEY, CHARLES
